data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for separate policies for different roles.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement for separate policies for different roles (drivers, warehouse, office). However, the evidence provided does not include any specific checks or API reads that confirm this functionality. The linked use case mentions the need for separate policies, but there are no concrete examples or evidence of these features being implemented or tested, leading to an inconclusive validation.
gaps: No evidence of separate policies for different roles (drivers, warehouse, office).

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
